name: java-llm-extractor
description: Extract Java JSF application menu architecture to LLM-friendly Markdown.
author: Andre Mesquita

scripts.build: tsc index.ts --outDir dist --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --target ES2018 --module CommonJS --types node && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64 --out-path bin
